name: Edition Ltd.
summary: Edition Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the agricultural and related business in Singapore. The company produces leafy vegetables and fruits. It is also involved in project management and property development. The company was formerly known as Oniontech Limited and changed its name to Edition Ltd. in July 2014. Edition Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Singapore. Edition Ltd. is a subsidiary of B&L Group Pte. Ltd.
